achievements.description: FINALLY rescue Dr. Pettrovich (For real this time)

achievements.description: Cross the aqueduct without using the oxygen tank

achievements.description: Defeat the enemy commander without taking damage

achievements.description: Escape Outer Heaven without using the cigarettes
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Age Hasn't Slowed You Down One Bit
achievements.description: Escape Outer Heaven without using the cigarettes with at least 90 (900) seconds left on the timer

achievements.title: Operation Intrude N313
achievements.description: Jungle: Reach building #1 without being spotted (Unavoidable alerts don't count)
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Make Sure Nobody Sees You
achievements.description: Bldg. 1: Complete 1F and 3F and reach the hidden cell without being spotted (No shortcuts. Unavoidable alerts don't count)

achievements.title: This Is A Stealth Mission
achievements.description: Bldg. 1: Complete 2F and Roof and reach Dr. Pettrovich's cell without being spotted
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Isaac Newton Would Like a Word With You
achievements.description: Bldg 2: Complete 1F and Roof and reach the second floor from the Up elevator without being spotted
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Stealth is My Specialty
achievements.description: Bldg 2: Complete the 2F, obtaining all items and find the impostor without being spotted (Unavoidable alerts don't count)
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Only A Fool Trusts His Life to a Weapon
achievements.description: Bldg. 1: Complete 1F and 3F and reach the hidden cell without using a weapon (No shortcuts)

achievements.description: Bldg. 1: Complete 2F and Roof and reach Dr. Pettrovich's cell without using a weapon
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.description: Bldg. 2: Complete 1F and Roof and reach 2F from the Up elevator without using a weapon
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.description: Bldg. 2: Complete the 2F, obtaining all items and find the impostor without using a weapon
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.description: Reach building #1 without killing anyone, human or otherwise

achievements.title: Death Brings Sorrow
achievements.description: Bldg. 1: Complete 1F and 3F and reach the hidden cell without killing anyone (No shortcuts)

achievements.description: Bldg. 1: Complete 2F and Roof and reach Dr. Pettrovich's cell without killing anyone

achievements.description: Bldg. 2: Complete 1F and Roof and reach 2F from the Up elevator without killing anyone

achievements.description: Bldg. 2: Complete the 2F, obtaining all items and find the impostor without killing anyone

achievements.title: Destiny
achievements.description: Find the key to true happiness and achieve inner peace

achievements.description: Obtain all weapons and the silencer and full ammo for all weapons

achievements.description: Yeah, Grey Fox died of a heart attack. I don't know what happened.

achievements.description: Complete the game without collecting the silencer (No password)
